category_sources: source_facts.description says Glulxe is a portable VM like the Z-machine; official eblong.com Glulx page says Glulxe is the Glulx interpreter for a portable IF VM.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glulxe; official eblong.com page and official GitHub repository use Glulxe.
docs_sources: Official eblong.com Glulx page documents the VM and Glulxe; official GitHub README documents building and running Glulxe.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository erkyrath/glulxe is owned by Andrew Plotkin's account and describes Glulxe as the Glulx VM reference interpreter.
tags_sources: source_facts.description references a portable VM like the Z-machine; official eblong.com page identifies Glulx as a 32-bit VM for interactive fiction and Glulxe as its interpreter.
